resources.string: Tap to scan for Fardriver controllers

FarDriver Whisperer reads and tunes FarDriver motor controllers over Bluetooth LE. It shows live telemetry (voltage, current, RPM, temperatures, state of charge), exposes the controller\'s full parameter set for tuning, and includes developer tools — a raw packet sniffer, a live diagnostics view, and a capture analyzer for decoding controller data.

This controls a high-power motor system. Always put the rear wheel on a stand, clear of people and obstructions, before changing parameters or running throttle captures. Incorrect current, voltage, or field-weakening settings can damage your controller, motor, or battery. Change one parameter at a time and verify. Use at your own risk.
Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by FarDriver/NanJing FarDriver Controller Co.
Built by Brett Halliday 2026, Facebook New England E-Bike and PEV.
